_comment: Phase 5 / Gate 5 evidence manifest — Command Dashboard (Next.js, App Router, Vercel-targeted). 5 surfaces, live DeepSeek report via serverless route (key server-side), DEMO MODE on safe-simulator synthetic data. Design tokens from talos.css; behavior from the blueprint. PRODUCT_NAME read from @crown/contracts (never hardcoded).

criteria.title: WCAG 2.x AA on key flows; severity/status never color-only
criteria.expected: icon+label for every severity/status; keyboard-operable controls; accessible names; html lang sync

criteria.title: No hardcoded user-facing strings; locale-ready ID+EN
criteria.expected: EN+ID dictionary + t()/tf(); zero hardcoded chrome strings (data tokens excepted)

gate_checks.expected: both PASS after fix cycle (initial FAIL -> fixed -> re-verified)

gate_checks.check: /api/analyze calls DeepSeek server-side; key never in client

notes: Pre-existing biome lint debt (key={i}, role=radio button, role=dialog div) is unchanged from this commit and non-blocking; next build skips linting.
